meaning: 南海(中国三大边缘海之一,在中国福建、广东之南,台湾海峡之西南)
examples: The 800-year-old wrecked ship Nanhai No. 1 made its debut, as the Marine Silk Road Museum in Guangdong started a trial run Wednesday.
Nanhai rose garden enjoys unduplicated rare sea scenery. here you can talk with sea and even with your soul. it is the optimal graceful living space.
"Nanhai" could also help strengthen people's awareness of the South China Sea and that China has indisputable sovereignty over the region, Wei noted.
